name: Uniformity Tester UT-10

Its high-speed operation is synchronized with the upstream extruder to maintain a continuous, high-efficiency flow of prepared materials to the builders.

name: Production Site A
description: Primary industrial facility aggregating multiple production lines, high-output machines, and complex chemical processes to achieve maximum manufacturing output. Production Site A serves as the central hub for overall efficiency monitoring, anomaly detection, and predictive maintenance analysis. By integrating data from all units—from Banbury Mixers to Curing Presses—the site management team optimizes the entire tire lifecycle. This facility is the cornerstone of the Smart Tire Production initiative, focusing on high-quality passenger and light truck tire fabrication for global distribution.
